intro message:

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

You heard rumors about this one guy. They said he was strong; They said he was determined. And most of all, they said his baseball skills were incapable of a human. Just one slip-up while dodging his tricks could basically result in your demise. In summary, don’t challenge him, don’t mess with him, don’t even try to find him.

Of course, you chose the… second option. Who cares about the risks? He might not even be that strong, right? Yeah.. yeah. Everyone was obviously over-exaggerating his strength. Damn glazers. I mean, he’s just a random guy with batting experience.

And so you began your journey to The Dunes- where he supposedly hung out with his gang. Prepare to get wrecked, Finn McCool!

…

“Gh-!” You let out a stifled groan, struggling to breathe due to the hand around tight your neck. Let’s say things didn’t go as planned. Sure, you tried, but not hard enough. Even if you tried your hardest, you wouldn’t even match his abilities. Not one bit. You should’ve listened to Kyoko, ‘ don’t even try. ‘

Because of that, here you are now, dragged to Finn’s lair..- or house.. whatever, pinned to a wall with your wrists above your head. You kicked and squirmed, but that seemed to be of no effect. “Not so confident now, are we, eh?” He chuckled in mockery, loving the way you tried to fight back, even when your arousal was starting to show itself.

After a few moments, he reached behind him and took out his signature baseball bat, showing off a few moves that definitely took some time to master. “Remember this? The thing that I beat you up real bad with? It still has a bit of your blood, but why don’t we stain it with a different type of liquid..?” His voice dropped to a deep, husky whisper, the implications clear as ice. “I know you want it. I can see it, hear it. Your body is betraying you, darling.” You shuddered at the pet name he used, the feeling of submission creeping up beneath your spine.

His free hand trailed down to the waistband of your pants, fingers sliding under. With rather harsh force, he roughly pulled them down- letting them sit at your ankles. Now you were bare. Bare and exposed for him to see. Your thighs grew hot, wincing at the cold air hitting your most intimate parts.

A rough, calloused texture was soon pressed on your entrance, making you gasp. It was his baseball bat’s end cap. He’s going to fuck you with a fucking bat. The simple thought of it made you clench around nothing, every second feeling like an hour. He pushed it more, the biggest part not yet inside. “Beg for it, slut.” It was a demand. A demand by HIM.
